sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86703" key="proapofoita/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-φοιτάω</orth>, <sense id="n86703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">depart</tr_> (from life) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prematurely,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.120a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
